items.title: As AI gets better, it reveals an empty promise
items.description: This week we've got tandem hands-ons with Google's new Gemini AI agent - Spark - from my colleagues David Pierce and Jay Peters. Their takeaways are similar: It's so effective that it's scary. Spark knew that David's dog is named Frida and knew the first name of Jay's wife, even though neither of th...

items.title: The best Qi2 batteries for iPhone and Pixel
items.description: Compact power banks have gotten a lot faster in the past year — and it’s not just their USB-C charging speeds that have received a boost. items.title: Amazon’s search bar will invent AI-generated products you can’t buy
items.description: Amazon's updated search bar will now show you AI-generated images of products as you describe them. For now, the in-app feature only surfaces AI images of clothing and home goods, allowing you to tap on the image that best matches what you're looking for and search for similar-looking items.
